GpuProjectExec: expr=[wsk1@0 as wsk1, isk1@1 as isk1, dmoy1@2 as dmoy1, mean1@3 as mean1, cov1@4 as cov1, w_warehouse_sk@5 as w_warehouse_sk, i_item_sk@6 as i_item_sk, d_moy@7 as d_moy, mean@8 as mean, cov@9 as cov]
  GpuSortPreservingMergeExec: [w_warehouse_sk@10 ASC, i_item_sk@11 ASC, d_moy@12 ASC, mean@13 ASC, cov@14 ASC, d_moy@7 ASC, mean@8 ASC, cov@9 ASC]
    GpuSortExec: expr=[w_warehouse_sk@10 ASC, i_item_sk@11 ASC, d_moy@12 ASC, mean@13 ASC, cov@14 ASC, d_moy@7 ASC, mean@8 ASC, cov@9 ASC]
      GpuProjectExec: expr=[w_warehouse_sk@0 as wsk1, i_item_sk@1 as isk1, d_moy@2 as dmoy1, mean@3 as mean1, cov@4 as cov1, w_warehouse_sk@5 as w_warehouse_sk, i_item_sk@6 as i_item_sk, d_moy@7 as d_moy, mean@8 as mean, cov@9 as cov, w_warehouse_sk@0 as w_warehouse_sk, i_item_sk@1 as i_item_sk, d_moy@2 as d_moy, mean@3 as mean, cov@4 as cov]
        GpuCoalesceBatchesExec: target_batch_size=12782640
          GpuHashJoinExec: join_type=Inner, on=[(i_item_sk@1, i_item_sk@1), (w_warehouse_sk@0, w_warehouse_sk@0)]
            GpuCoalesceBatchesExec: target_batch_size=12782640
              GpuRepartitionExec: partitioning=Hash([i_item_sk@1, w_warehouse_sk@0], 8), input_partitions=8
                GpuProjectExec: expr=[w_warehouse_sk@0 as w_warehouse_sk, i_item_sk@1 as i_item_sk, d_moy@2 as d_moy, avg(inventory.inv_quantity_on_hand)@4 as mean, CASE avg(inventory.inv_quantity_on_hand)@4 WHEN 0 THEN NULL ELSE stddev(inventory.inv_quantity_on_hand)@3 / avg(inventory.inv_quantity_on_hand)@4 END as cov]
                  GpuCoalesceBatchesExec: target_batch_size=12782640
                    GpuFilterExec: predicate=CASE avg(inventory.inv_quantity_on_hand)@4 WHEN 0 THEN 0 ELSE stddev(inventory.inv_quantity_on_hand)@3 / avg(inventory.inv_quantity_on_hand)@4 END > 1
                      GpuProjectExec: expr=[w_warehouse_sk@1 as w_warehouse_sk, i_item_sk@2 as i_item_sk, d_moy@3 as d_moy, stddev(inventory.inv_quantity_on_hand)@4 as stddev(inventory.inv_quantity_on_hand), avg(inventory.inv_quantity_on_hand)@5 as avg(inventory.inv_quantity_on_hand)]
                        GpuAggregateExec: group_by=[w_warehouse_name, w_warehouse_sk, i_item_sk, d_moy], aggr=[stddev(inventory.inv_quantity_on_hand), avg(inventory.inv_quantity_on_hand)]
                          GpuCoalesceBatchesExec: target_batch_size=12782640
                            GpuRepartitionExec: partitioning=Hash([w_warehouse_name@0, w_warehouse_sk@1, i_item_sk@2, d_moy@3], 8), input_partitions=8
                              GpuAggregateExec: group_by=[w_warehouse_name, w_warehouse_sk, i_item_sk, d_moy], aggr=[stddev(inventory.inv_quantity_on_hand), avg(inventory.inv_quantity_on_hand)]
                                GpuProjectExec: expr=[inv_quantity_on_hand@1 as inv_quantity_on_hand, i_item_sk@2 as i_item_sk, w_warehouse_sk@3 as w_warehouse_sk, w_warehouse_name@4 as w_warehouse_name, d_moy@0 as d_moy]
                                  GpuCoalesceBatchesExec: target_batch_size=12782640
                                    GpuHashJoinExec: join_type=Inner, on=[(d_date_sk@0, inv_date_sk@0)], projection=[1, 3, 4, 5, 6]
                                      GpuCoalesceBatchesExec: target_batch_size=12782640
                                        GpuRepartitionExec: partitioning=Hash([d_date_sk@0], 8), input_partitions=8
                                          GpuCoalesceBatchesExec: target_batch_size=12782640
                                            GpuFilterExec: predicate=d_moy@2 = 1 AND d_year@1 = 2001, projection=[0, 2]
                                              GpuRepartitionExec: partitioning=RoundRobinBatch(8), input_partitions=1
                                                GpuScanExec: batch_size=12782640
                                      GpuCoalesceBatchesExec: target_batch_size=12782640
                                        GpuRepartitionExec: partitioning=Hash([inv_date_sk@0], 8), input_partitions=8
                                          GpuProjectExec: expr=[inv_date_sk@2 as inv_date_sk, inv_quantity_on_hand@3 as inv_quantity_on_hand, i_item_sk@4 as i_item_sk, w_warehouse_sk@0 as w_warehouse_sk, w_warehouse_name@1 as w_warehouse_name]
                                            GpuCoalesceBatchesExec: target_batch_size=12782640
                                              GpuHashJoinExec: join_type=Inner, on=[(w_warehouse_sk@0, inv_warehouse_sk@1)], projection=[0, 1, 2, 4, 5]
                                                GpuCoalesceBatchesExec: target_batch_size=12782640
                                                  GpuRepartitionExec: partitioning=Hash([w_warehouse_sk@0], 8), input_partitions=1
                                                    GpuScanExec: batch_size=12782640
                                                GpuCoalesceBatchesExec: target_batch_size=12782640
                                                  GpuRepartitionExec: partitioning=Hash([inv_warehouse_sk@1], 8), input_partitions=8

                                                      GpuCoalesceBatchesExec: target_batch_size=12782640

                                GpuProjectExec: expr=[inv_quantity_on_hand@1 as inv_quantity_on_hand, i_item_sk@2 as i_item_sk, w_warehouse_sk@3 as w_warehouse_sk, w_warehouse_name@4 as w_warehouse_name, d_moy@0 as d_moy]
                                  GpuCoalesceBatchesExec: target_batch_size=12782640
                                    GpuHashJoinExec: join_type=Inner, on=[(d_date_sk@0, inv_date_sk@0)], projection=[1, 3, 4, 5, 6]
